CustomField.description:
Date on which the event that caused the MR change happened. To be used for snapshot creation.
1. Yes, We are still using this field.
From Payment code- when payment record is updated and status equals to cancelled 1. We are updating {Date Of Snapshot Event} with payment line item record field- "{Payment Date}"
From Payment Line Item code - when payment line item record is updated 1. We are updating {Date Of Snapshot Event} with payment line item record field- "{Payment Date}" on supplement rent record
From Invoice Line Item code- when invoice line item record is updated 1. We are updating {Date Of Snapshot Event} with Invoice line item record field- "{Invoice Date}" on supplement rent record
CustomField.label: _Date Of Snapshot Event
